words.meaning: good enough to be allowed or approved
words.japaneseMeaning: 受け入れられる、許容できる
words.example: This level of noise is not acceptable in the library.

words.meaning: funny or able to make people laugh
words.japaneseMeaning: ユーモアのある、おかしい
words.example: His humorous speech relaxed the audience.

words.meaning: from nature and not made by people
words.example: They prefer natural fabrics like cotton.

words.meaning: lasting only a short time or using few words
words.example: He gave a brief summary of the meeting.

words.meaning: having a lot of room or space
words.example: The apartment is bright and spacious.
Please give precise directions to the station.

words.meaning: showing that you are sorry for something
words.japaneseMeaning: 申し訳なさそうな、謝罪の
words.example: He sounded apologetic after missing the meeting.

words.meaning: happening all the time or not changing
words.example: The constant noise made it hard to study.
The school is in a quiet rural area.
